name: aliyun
description: Evaluations for aliyun skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-explicit
evals.description: Skill should trigger when user needs to interact with Alibaba Cloud services

prompts.input: List all ECS instances in cn-hangzhou region on Alibaba Cloud
prompts.reason: ECS and Alibaba Cloud are explicit triggers for this skill

prompts.input: Upload a file to my OSS bucket on 阿里云
prompts.reason: OSS and 阿里云 (Chinese name) are listed trigger keywords

prompts.input: Show me the RDS database instances in my aliyun account
prompts.reason: RDS and aliyun are both listed trigger keywords

prompts.input: Deploy a function to Alibaba Cloud FC serverless
prompts.reason: FC (Function Compute) and serverless are listed trigger keywords

evals.name: trigger-negative-general
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for other cloud providers or unrelated tasks

prompts.reason: AWS is a different cloud provider, not Alibaba Cloud
Google Cloud is a different cloud provider, not Alibaba Cloud

prompts.input: How does object storage work in general?
prompts.reason: General concept explanation, not specific to Alibaba Cloud CLI usage
